name: atxp
description: Access ATXP paid API tools for web search, AI image generation, music creation, video generation, and X/Twitter search. Use when users need real-time web search, AI-generated media (images, music, video), or X/Twitter search. Requires authentication via `npx atxp login`.
capabilities: Execute real-time web searches using ATXP search API
Generate AI images from text prompts using ATXP image service
Create AI-generated music tracks from descriptions
Produce AI videos from text prompts
Search X/Twitter for real-time social media content
Authenticate and manage ATXP API connections
author: atxp-dev
securitySummary: All 36 static analysis findings have been evaluated and dismissed as false positives. The detected 'external_commands' are documentation examples (shell commands in backticks), not actual code execution. Network URLs point to legitimate ATXP API endpoints. Filesystem and environment access patterns are for standard configuration management. This skill provides documentation for accessing a legitimate paid API service.
valueStatement: Get real-time web search results and generate AI images, music, and videos through ATXP's paid API services. This skill helps Claude Code users leverage powerful external AI tools without leaving their development environment.
userTitle: Access ATXP AI Tools for Search and Media Generation
limitations: Requires ATXP account and authentication via `npx atxp login`
API usage may incur charges based on ATXP pricing
Dependent on ATXP service availability and rate limits
Cannot modify or delete content created through ATXP services

useCases.title: Research and Content Creation
useCases.description: Content creators and researchers can perform real-time web searches and generate AI images, music, or videos to enhance their projects without switching between multiple tools.

useCases.title: Social Media Monitoring
useCases.description: Developers and analysts can search X/Twitter for brand mentions, trending topics, or competitor activity to inform product decisions and marketing strategies.

useCases.title: Rapid Prototyping with AI Assets
useCases.description: Developers can quickly generate placeholder images, audio, or video content for prototypes and demos without needing design skills or external software.

promptTemplates.title: Search the Web
promptTemplates.prompt: Search for information about [topic]. Use ATXP search to find the latest results.

promptTemplates.title: Generate an AI Image
promptTemplates.prompt: Create an AI image with the prompt: [detailed description of image]. Use ATXP image generation.

promptTemplates.title: Multi-Tool Research Workflow
promptTemplates.prompt: Search for [topic] using ATXP web search, then generate an image that represents the key findings. Summarize the search results and create a visual.
promptTemplates.scenario: Intermediate - Combined search and image generation

promptTemplates.title: Social Media Content Pipeline
promptTemplates.prompt: Search X for trending posts about [topic/industry] in the last 24 hours. Analyze the sentiment and themes, then generate an AI music track that captures the mood of the conversation.
promptTemplates.scenario: Advanced - X search with creative generation

bestPractices: Always verify that ATXP_CONNECTION is set before running commands to avoid authentication errors
Use descriptive, detailed prompts for image/music/video generation to get higher quality results
Cache search results when appropriate to minimize API usage and reduce costs
antiPatterns: Do not share ATXP credentials or connection strings in public repositories or chat logs
Avoid running expensive generation commands (video, high-res images) without confirming user intent first
Do not rely solely on ATXP search results for critical security or medical decisions

faq.question: Do I need an ATXP account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need an ATXP account and must authenticate using `npx atxp login` before using the API tools. The skill will check for the ATXP_CONNECTION environment variable.

faq.question: Is there a cost to use ATXP services?
faq.answer: Yes, ATXP is a paid API service. Usage charges depend on which tools you use (search, image generation, music, video) and your volume of requests. Check ATXP pricing for details.

faq.question: What AI models power the image and video generation?
faq.answer: ATXP uses various AI models for generation. The specific models are managed by ATXP and may change as they update their services. The skill simply interfaces with their API.

faq.question: Can I use this skill with Codex or only Claude Code?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code as indicated in the supported tools. The commands are executed through the CLI interface.

faq.question: What should I do if I get an authentication error?
faq.answer: Run `npx atxp login` to authenticate, then source the configuration file with `source ~/.atxp/config` to set the ATXP_CONNECTION environment variable.

faq.question: Are there rate limits for ATXP API calls?
faq.answer: Yes, ATXP enforces rate limits based on your account tier. If you encounter rate limit errors, you may need to wait before making additional requests or upgrade your ATXP plan.
